name: AI Providers

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Added Tool Calling and ability to set modalities of the models

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Fixed mobile model selector

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Expanded Provider Support Added support for extensive list of new AI providers: - DeepSeek - xAI (Grok) - Perplexity AI - Z.AI - Mistral AI - Cerebras - Together AI - Fireworks AI - Novita AI - DeepInfra - SambaNova ### Model Selection Implemented a combobox for easier model selection in provider settings. Added valid visibility toggle (show/hide) for the API Key field in the provider configuration modal. ### ✨ Improvements Enhanced `OpenAIHandler` to support streamed reasoning by wrapping it in `` tags, improving compatibility with reasoning models via OpenRouter. ### 🌐 Localization Added support for 7 new languages: - Spanish - Italian - French - Dutch - Portuguese - Japanese - Korean ### 🔧 Internal Refactored the testing infrastructure from Jest to **Vitest**.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### Finally added Anthropic provider

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Benchmark for RAG
Using https://huggingface.co/datasets/nvidia/TechQA-RAG-Eval
| Item | Value |
| --- | --- |
| TopK | 10 |
| Embedding Model | text-embedding-3-small |
| Completion Model | google/gemini-2.5-flash |
| Evaluation Method | embedding |
| Documents | 496 |
| Queries | 50 |
| Sum Score | 2918.00 |
| Mean Score | 58.36 (🟠 Fair) |
| Hit@K | 0.9400 (🟡 Good) |

### L2-normalization for embeddings
Minor retrieve improve.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Added Fetch Selector heuristic to determine the best way to call the API: native fetch, electron's fetch, obsidian's fetch.
Closes #12
Enhanced embeddings caching mechanism with consistent key generation

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed `electronFetch`, which was broken in the previous build. Closes #10.
- Added universal caching for embeddings — just call `embed`, and it will cache the content key and the returned value for each provider and model. In other words, it caches every content/embedding pair globally across all plugins.
